title: citrus × nobilis subf. yatsushiro
intro: Citrus × nobilis subf. yatsushiro, also known as the Yuzu plant, is a type of citrus fruit that is native to East Asia, specifically in the Ryukyu Islands of Japan. The Yuzu plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Yuzu include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, as well as having anti-cancer properties. Yuzu is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
